projectDescription: A Windows DLL that adds Discord Rich Presence functionality to MobaXterm terminal emulator.
keyFeatures: Discord Rich Presence integration for MobaXterm
Two versions: complete (full activity tracking) and silence (basic status)
Tracks text editor sessions, terminal activity, and local bash sessions
Cross-platform build system using GitHub Actions
publicApiSurface: StartDiscordRPC() - Exported C function to start Discord RPC
UpdateMobaState() - Track MobaXterm process state (complete version)
UpdateDiscordPresence() - Update presence based on state (complete version)
IsProcessRunning() - Check if process is active (complete version)
bashrun() - Check if local bash is running (complete version)
